description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a robust, rectangular wooden frame and deep, boxy armrests. The seat and back cushions are upholstered in a distressed red fabric with prominent white wear patterns, giving it a weathered, urban look. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. The armrests and base are constructed from a dark, richly grained wood, providing a stark contrast to the worn upholstery. The legs are short, block-style, and integrated into the frame, barely elevating the sofa off the ground. This piece would be well-suited for public urban spaces such as parks, bus stops, or communal outdoor areas.
description: A three-seater sofa with a dark wooden frame and distressed red-and-white upholstered cushions, featuring boxy armrests and a weathered urban aesthetic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick wooden armrest and the profile of the three distressed red cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all three seat and back cushions, the full width of the sofa, and both armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and cushion profile from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid wooden back and the sofa's sturdy construction, with no cushions visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and uniformly sized, arranged in a single row.
attribute_armrest_style: Boxy, straight armrests at each end, matching the height of the backrest and constructed from solid wood with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs integrated into the wooden frame at each corner, with a recessed appearance and a matching wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three attached back cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and wear pattern.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Distressed red fabric with irregular white wear marks, creating a weathered, urban texture; no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
